Israel Kouperman

I am a 21 y/o web and design enthusiast with the desire to improve the visual and interactive world of the web and mobile. This portfolio website will guide you through my journy to the world of technology.

InWaves

Surfing club and news journal website dedicated for the love of the ocean and its elements.

Full website, product navigation, search, main page, admin panel. Designed based on Twitter-Bootstrap.
